title: astragalus lanzhouensis
intro: Astragalus lanzhouensis, also known as Lanzhou milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used in Chinese medicine to enhance immune function and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-aging, anti-oxidation, and anti-fatigue effects, as well as cardiovascular and respiratory system protection. Astragalus lanzhouensis can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are often used to boost the immune system, improve sleep quality, and increase overall well-being.
